turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, does your clinic have an ambulance service or some emergency transport?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes! Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic operates two ambulances available 24 hours a day. For emergencies within Pune, response time is typically 15 to 25 minutes. You can call our emergency line directly or ask for the ambulance through this number.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Is there a charge for the ambulance?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For patients being admitted to our clinic, the ambulance within a 10 km radius is complimentary. Beyond that, charges apply based on distance. For non-admission transport, standard charges start at ₹800.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: And do the ambulances have oxygen and basic life support equipment?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, both ambulances are BLS-equipped — oxygen cylinders, defibrillator, stretcher, IV setup, and are staffed with a trained paramedic.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, good to know. Thank you.
